message:
feat(cass): Cx-first export_sessions_with_cx + export_content_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add Cx-first siblings for the two pub async cass-export entry points:

1. `export_sessions_with_cx(cx, storage, query)` — pre-flight
   checkpoint gates the session export before get_panes() +
   export_sessions() + per-session content_tokens estimation fire.
   The cass connector can have many concurrent export batches in
   flight; a cancelled parent cx bails immediately at the boundary.

2. `export_content_with_cx(cx, storage, session_id, query)` —
   pre-flight checkpoint gates the content chunk fetch before the
   session lookup + segment scan. Used by the cass connector's
   per-session chunk-fetch loop.

Both feature-gated as `cfg(all(feature = "cass-export", feature =
"asupersync-runtime"))`. Legacy `export_sessions` + `export_content`
preserved unchanged.

Regression test `cass_export_sessions_with_cx_empty_db_matches_legacy`
pins behavioural parity on an empty DB: fresh cx produces the same
empty Vec as the legacy path.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features cass-export,asupersync-runtime):
73/73 cass tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
